M1350_LESION_OPEN_WND M1350 Skin Lesion Or Open Wound This field indicates whether the patient has a skin lesion or open wound, excluding bowel ostomy that is receiving intervention by the home health agency. 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x x x
